{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320121753F65003E913D8ECA978DE"}"},"total":78},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7384035921429857049","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看值得推荐棒棒哒"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719231804,"group_id":"7343561375009999896","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"希望一直有好书看🤓🤩","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Prg7EZIrbGbg8/+h9trczc6KMcvM5vGN/P/OxQHoMG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1112325995889501","user_name":"我有一个梦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1112325995889501","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1739465305,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7343561375009999896","book_info":{"abstract":"苏莫承穿越到了一个平行世界，
而这里与他前世不同的是，
龙国历史出现断层，流传下来的也只剩下一些故事的残片，再经过人们的口口相传和反复加工，更是难以理解和让人相信。
龙国竟然不知道自己的历史！
恰巧这时，国运游戏降临，
被选中的玩家进入国运空间，进行国家与国家之间的历史文物解说对战！
成功者，可以获得大量奖励，增加国运！
失败者，只能接受严重惩罚，国土沦陷！
苏莫承被选中成为国运游戏的选手！
而他，可以说是这个世界中，对龙国历史最为精通之人！
不鸣则已，一鸣惊人！
苏莫承力挽狂澜，拯救在国运游戏中绝对败势的龙国！
龙国民众想都没有想过，
龙国竟然真的在这样绝对劣势的游戏中，
被苏莫承带领着一路高升，问鼎世界第一强国！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8c7a5911ea2b3ff4cb5f4ff9eb2cf213~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"百分百原生木","author_id":"","book_id":"7343561375009999896","book_name":"让参加国运，没让你编造华夏历史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2358人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7343561489258660376","read_count":"2358","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"309248"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"147","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,直播,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e6b1918a080742b100767d1cc88de20b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779164273&x-signature=acDEnJJRELdS0GlDdb%2B%2BXMfiATw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"298676899811133","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"131"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320121753F65003E913D8ECA978DE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10213,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":30150,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":887},"user_action"
